시편 139:1.content: Yahweh, you have searched me, and you know me.

시편 139:2.content: You know my sitting down and my rising up. You perceive my thoughts from afar.

시편 139:3.content: You search out my path and my lying down, and are acquainted with all my ways.

시편 139:4.content: For there is not a word on my tongue, but, behold, Yahweh, you know it altogether.

시편 139:5.content: You hem me in behind and before. You laid your hand on me.

시편 139:6.content: This knowledge is beyond me. It’s lofty. I can’t attain it.

시편 139:7.content: Where could I go from your Spirit? Or where could I flee from your presence?

시편 139:8.content: If I ascend up into heaven, you are there. If I make my bed in Sheol, behold, you are there!

시편 139:9.content: If I take the wings of the dawn, and settle in the uttermost parts of the sea,

시편 139:10.content: even there your hand will lead me, and your right hand will hold me.

시편 139:11.content: If I say, “Surely the darkness will overwhelm me. The light around me will be night,”

시편 139:12.content: even the darkness doesn’t hide from you, but the night shines as the day. The darkness is like light to you.

시편 139:13.content: For you formed my inmost being. You knit me together in my mother’s womb.

시편 139:14.content: I will give thanks to you, for I am fearfully and wonderfully made. Your works are wonderful. My soul knows that very well.

시편 139:15.content: My frame wasn’t hidden from you, when I was made in secret, woven together in the depths of the earth.

시편 139:16.content: Your eyes saw my body. In your book they were all written, the days that were ordained for me, when as yet there were none of them.

시편 139:17.content: How precious to me are your thoughts, God! How vast is their sum!

시편 139:18.content: If I would count them, they are more in number than the sand. When I wake up, I am still with you.

시편 139:19.content: If only you, God, would kill the wicked. Get away from me, you bloodthirsty men!

시편 139:20.content: For they speak against you wickedly. Your enemies take your name in vain.

시편 139:21.content: Yahweh, don’t I hate those who hate you? Am I not grieved with those who rise up against you?

시편 139:22.content: I hate them with perfect hatred. They have become my enemies.

시편 139:23.content: Search me, God, and know my heart. Try me, and know my thoughts.

시편 139:24.content: See if there is any wicked way in me, and lead me in the everlasting way.
